emails.subject: StatOil Trade
emails.body: On this Statoil Trade, I guess this is a physical trade done with ENA. Can you do one of those handy dandy little sheets you do for me so I can attach them to my assignment. I am forever in your debt... Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 03/29/2000 05:11 PM From: Lorie Hernandez ENRON 03/29/2000 05:08 PM
